---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for byd-n16-rgb
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem or limitation. Ex. "I can't automate X because..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want added or changed — CLI flag, effect, zone behavior, config, packaging, docs, etc.

**Use case**
How you would use it in practice (keybind, hypridle/swayidle hook, toggle/cycle, desktop integration, etc.).

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Other ways to solve it, or workarounds you've tried.

**Hardware / protocol context** (if relevant)

- Laptop model: [e.g. Infinix GT Book]
- `lsusb` shows `340e:8002`: [yes / no]
- Related effect or zone: [e.g. per-zone breath, global wave, section 4 numpad]
- Does Infinix Control Center on Windows support something similar? [yes / no / unsure]

**Additional context**
Wireshark captures, screenshots, or links that support the request.
